description: Logit, probit, and discrete choice model tests

tests.prompt: Estimate the probability of loan default based on borrower characteristics
tests.dataset_context: credit dataset: default (0/1), income, debt_ratio, credit_score, employment_years

tests.prompt: Run a logistic regression to predict customer churn
tests.dataset_context: telecom dataset: churned (0/1), tenure, monthly_charges, contract_type, support_calls

tests.prompt: Use probit to model the binary choice of labor force participation
tests.dataset_context: labor dataset: working (0/1), age, education, children, spouse_income

tests.prompt: Estimate a probit model for voting behavior
tests.dataset_context: election dataset: voted (0/1), age, education, income, party_affiliation

tests.prompt: Model the binary outcome of bankruptcy using maximum likelihood
tests.dataset_context: bankruptcy dataset: bankrupt (0/1), current_ratio, debt_equity, roa, size

tests.prompt: Fit a logit model with firm and year fixed effects
tests.dataset_context: panel_binary dataset: firm, year, outcome (0/1), x1, x2, x3

tests.prompt: Predict the probability of disease occurrence based on risk factors
tests.dataset_context: health dataset: disease (0/1), age, smoking, bmi, blood_pressure, family_history

tests.prompt: Analyze the determinants of firm export participation with a binary choice model
tests.dataset_context: trade dataset: exports (0/1), firm_size, productivity, foreign_ownership, r_and_d

tests.prompt: Estimate marginal effects from a probit regression
tests.dataset_context: choice dataset: y (0/1), x1, x2, x3

tests.prompt: Run a Poisson regression with fixed effects for count data
tests.dataset_context: patent dataset: firm, year, patent_count, r_and_d, firm_size, industry
